5,0,3.nbt: {components:{"minecraft:custom_data":{dt_loot_prefab_id:"pot"}},item:{components:{"minecraft:custom_data":{dt_random_book:"adventurers_field_notes",dt_random_book_variant:24},"minecraft:written_book_content":{author:"Anonymous Adventurer",pages:[{raw:'"You\'ll learn the smell.\\n\\nIt\'s not the smell of a campfire. It\'s not the smell of wood. It\'s the smell of words evaporating, if you\'ll let me get poetic for a second."'},{raw:'"After a while you stop noticing. Then you smell it on yourself and realise you\'ve been carrying it for days."'}],resolved:1b,title:{raw:"Adventurer's Field Notes"}}},count:1,id:"minecraft:written_book"}}
